title: grumilea cagayanensis
intro: Grumilea cagayanensis, also known as the Cagayan grumilea, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae and native to the Philippines. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Grumilea cagayanensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and wounds, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion by brewing its leaves in hot water, and sometimes it is also used in combination with other herbs for various herbal preparations.
